# Summary
- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

For project context and workflow expectations, see [`README.md`](../README.md).

## Change Type
- [ ] Task / feature improvement
- [ ] Bug fix

## Context
- [ ] System / workflow
- [ ] Campaign output
- [ ] Agent behaviour

## Validation
- [ ] Existing checks passed (if available)
- [ ] Manually reviewed for expected behaviour
- [ ] N/A (docs/process-only change)

## Linked Issue (optional)
- Closes #
